Nancy Pelosi just disclosed: 

- $1 million - $5 million of $INTC March 2027 calls
- 200 $UBER March 19, 2027 call option contracts with a $50 strike price

This was done last month May 29th. (her husband is the active trader executing this). Just for the people who like https://t.co/HDtn0T7QYL

Decisions about how to use AI in your organization are increasingly organizational design and strategy decisions, not IT choices: How do you integrate agents into your firm? What intelligence will you outsource? What are the boundaries of the firm? What is the role of people?

Incredible to see what a professional animator can do with AI video.

He created a 3D previz and then had Seedance render the actual anime - with the motion and camera control preserved!

(made by @craftcapitallab) https://t.co/pCA760dYli

字节跳动几乎是在所有AI领域都达到了临界点

刚试了下他们新的 AI 音乐模型

SeedMusic 1.0 Preview

一句话生成了一首完整的歌曲，而且速度还很快，大概2-3分钟，效果还真是挺不错的...

提示词：来一首古风歌曲，但是有着现代流行音乐的节奏感，能让人朗朗上口，关于爱情的歌曲 https://t.co/LrcxvDmh15

I got up with thoughts of where to exhibit our "Gallery of the Future" and I want it to be Times Square. Prices are very high and I will need to pay myself, but I found few possible screens that I could probably afford if I make a video of everyone's work, and maybe few parts
You have few more hours to submit until I close the gallery
